stimulus:
While researching a topic, a student has taken the following notes:

  • Naomi Beckwith is a curator at the Guggenheim Museum in New York.
  • She curated the Guggenheim's 2019 exhibition Implicit Tensions: Mapplethorpe Now.
  • This exhibition featured photographs by mid-career Black artists working in portraiture.
  • She also curated the Guggenheim's 2021 exhibition Off the Record, which gathered conceptual works by long-established artists examining archives.
stem: The student wants to describe the exhibition that Beckwith curated in 2019. Which choice most effectively uses relevant information from the notes to accomplish this goal?

answerOptions.content: Held at the Guggenheim Museum, the exhibition Off the Record gathered conceptual works by long-established artists examining archives.
In both 2019 and 2021, Naomi Beckwith curated exhibitions at the Guggenheim Museum in New York.
While one exhibition that Naomi Beckwith curated featured photographs by mid-career artists, another included conceptual works by long-established artists.
Implicit Tensions: Mapplethorpe Now, an exhibition at the Guggenheim Museum, featured photographs by mid-career Black artists working in portraiture.

rationale:
Choice D is the best answer because it describes the 2019 exhibition in particular by name and content.

Choice A describes the 2021 exhibition. Choice B describes the curator's general activity. Choice C compares the two exhibitions but doesn't focus on the 2019 one.
